F01 Authentication & Account: After agreeing to terms and signing up with a new email, a verification mail is sent and the account becomes active after email confirmation.
Emails violating RFC 5322 (missing @, missing domain, etc.) must be rejected on both client and server.
Passwords shorter than 8 chars or missing any of the 4 char classes (upper/lower/digit/symbol) are rejected with a clear message.
Before activation, clicking 'resend' issues a new token and invalidates the previous one.
OAuth with Google links/creates the account and issues a ShopFlow session token.
Reset request emails a 24h-valid token; accessing an expired link returns HTTP 410.
After first-factor success, a 6-digit TOTP within a 30s window must match before session is issued.
Login - lock account after 5 failed attempts
Five consecutive password failures on the same account trigger a 15-minute lock; further attempts from the same IP are blocked immediately.
Session - auto logout on expired token
Calls with an expired access token return 401; if refresh fails, the user is forced back to the login page.
F02 User Profile: JPG/PNG files up to 5MB upload successfully and immediately reflect in the profile (with thumbnail cache invalidation).
Files over 5MB or with disallowed types (SVG, EXE) are rejected with 413/400 while the existing photo is preserved.
After road-name/postal-code validation (Daum postal API), the address is added and sorted as the most recently used.
An 11th address attempt shows a 'max 10 addresses' notice; user must remove one to add another.
Toggling default unsets the previous default and is reflected immediately at checkout.
Card numbers are tokenized by the PG and only last-4 is stored (PCI-DSS); expiry validation runs before saving.
Payment method - notify 30 days before expiry
An automatic email + in-app notification fires once, 30 days before card expiry; user can dismiss.
Member tier - auto upgrade by spend
When cumulative spend crosses tier thresholds (e.g., SILVER 300K KRW), a nightly batch upgrades the tier and notifies the user.
On deletion PII is masked and permanently removed after 30 days (GDPR); user can request restoration within that window.
F03 Product Catalog: Root→4-depth categories return within 200ms; private categories are excluded.
Image, price, options, stock, and shipping info render together; LCP < 2.5s.
Product options - update price/stock on combo change
Changing color+size recomputes price/stock per SKU instantly; out-of-stock SKUs become unselectable.
Stock 0 - show sold-out and block purchase
SKUs with 0 stock show a 'sold out' badge, the Add button disables, and direct API calls are rejected by the backend.
Thumbnail click switches main image; hover zoom on desktop and pinch zoom on mobile both work.
Six recommendations are shown based on category/purchase patterns; CTR events fire on click.
Heart toggle adds/removes from wishlist immediately; guests are routed to a login modal.
Making a product private removes it from catalog/search/SEO sitemap immediately (cache invalidation included).
Product name/description switches to ko or en based on Accept-Language / user setting; missing translations fall back to ko.
